message:
fix(ci): Fix CHECKSUM env var in install-test workflow

Bug fixes discovered during code review:

1. Linux job: The CHECKSUM env var was referencing a non-existent
   output (${{ steps.install.outputs.checksum }}). Fixed by setting
   env vars inline before install.sh, matching the macOS job pattern.

2. Added allowlist entry for mock_allowlist pattern in
   tests/e2e_install_easy.rs comment (false positive from referencing
   the no_mock_allowlist.json filename).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,7 +72,10 @@ jobs:
           echo "CHECKSUM: $CHECKSUM" | tee -a install-test.log
           echo "" | tee -a install-test.log
 
-          # Run the installer
+          # Run the installer with env vars set inline (like macOS job)
+          ARTIFACT_URL="file://$ARTIFACT_PATH" \
+          CHECKSUM="$CHECKSUM" \
+          RUSTUP_INIT_SKIP=1 \
           timeout 60s bash install.sh \
             --version vtest \
             --easy-mode \
@@ -82,10 +85,6 @@ jobs:
 
           echo "" | tee -a install-test.log
           echo "=== Install completed ===" | tee -a install-test.log
-        env:
-          ARTIFACT_URL: file://${{ github.workspace }}/test-artifacts/cass-vtest-linux-x86_64.tar.gz
-          CHECKSUM: ${{ steps.install.outputs.checksum }}
-          RUSTUP_INIT_SKIP: 1  # Skip rustup since we already have Rust
 
       - name: Verify installation
         run: |

@@ -114,6 +114,15 @@
       "permanent": true,
       "note": "Fake rustc/cargo/sha256sum binaries allow fast isolated testing of install script logic. Full real-world install testing runs in CI workflow install-test.yml on Linux and macOS"
     },
+    {
+      "path": "tests/e2e_install_easy.rs",
+      "pattern": "mock_allowlist",
+      "rationale": "Documentation comment referencing no_mock_allowlist.json filename (false positive)",
+      "owner": "infra-team",
+      "review_date": "2026-07-26",
+      "permanent": true,
+      "note": "Comment references the allowlist file, not mock code"
+    },
     {
       "path": "src/sources/install.rs",
       "pattern": "mock_system_info",
